description: Galerina project Claude Code settings — devtools hooks and standard toolchain

hooks.description: Before tests: rebuild the governed .wasm for any fusable package (one with package.fungi.json) whose /src changed since its last build, so fused artifacts stay current (#175 fuse pipeline). Informational; always exits 0. Skip with GALERINA_SKIP_FUSE_REBUILD=1.

Full phase-close cadence at the end of every stage: core tests + devtools tests + security/naming audit sweep + provenance audit + full graph re-index. Always exits 0 (informational). Set GALERINA_SKIP_PHASE_CLOSE=1 to skip during rapid iteration. Benchmarks are intentionally NOT included (multi-minute) — run `npm run run` in galerina-devtools-benchmarks on demand.

Periodic drift heartbeat (informational, exit 0): one-line count of R&D done-files in ../Galerina-R-AND-D/_session-bridge/done/ not yet recorded in docs/Knowledge-Bases/galerina-rd-results-log.md — the absorption backlog the owner's standing process (feedback-rd-absorb-positive-and-negative) clears. Drop --summary for the actionable list.
Periodic drift heartbeat (informational, exit 0): one-line count of stray *.md outside docs/ + duplicate basenames + kb-graph orphans/broken-links. Drop --summary for the grouped report.

hooks.command: node packages-galerina/galerina-devtools-pci/dist/cli.js audit examples/auth-service >/dev/null 2>&1; c=$?; if [ "$c" = "0" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"PCI/DSS auth-service: PASS\",\"suppressOutput\":true}"; else echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"PCI/DSS auth-service: findings - run galerina-pci audit for detail\",\"suppressOutput\":true}"; fi; exit 0
hooks.description: PCI/DSS compliance heartbeat (RD-0168 context): galerina-pci audit over examples/auth-service. Informational, always exits 0 — surfaces PASS/findings via systemMessage. CLI is non-recursive (audits a dir with .fungi files directly); broaden the target as the surface grows.

devtools-standard-commands.provenance: node scripts/audit-provenance.mjs   (BLD-003 #219/#216: generated artifacts carry a provenance sidecar + are fresh vs sources; registered in lint-conventions)
devtools-standard-commands.code-index: node scripts/code-index.mjs   (query build/code-index/CODE_INDEX.md instead of grepping)
devtools-standard-commands.kb-index: node scripts/kb-index.mjs <terms>   (KB keyword search over ~495 docs — TOKEN-SAVER; build/kb-index/KB-INDEX.md; --code FUNGI-... for code lookup)
devtools-standard-commands.status: node scripts/status.mjs   (TOKEN-SAVER one-shot: live version/tests/overall-%/open-tasks/R&D-queue + doc pointers — READS version.json, do NOT re-run the suite just to get counts)
devtools-standard-commands.rd-absorb: node scripts/rd-absorb.mjs [--summary|--all|--json]   (flags R&D done-files in ../Galerina-R-AND-D/_session-bridge/done/ not yet in galerina-rd-results-log.md; --summary runs periodically at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.stray-docs: node scripts/audit-stray-docs.mjs [--summary|--json]   (stray/stale *.md outside docs/ + duplicate basenames + kb-graph orphans/broken-links; --summary runs periodically at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.code-registry: node scripts/gen-code-registry.mjs   (-> build/code-registry/REGISTRY.md, the live code catalog)
devtools-standard-commands.lint-conventions: node scripts/lint-conventions.mjs   (umbrella: #215 scanner + registered convention checks; --soft to report; --full adds the heavy SEC-002 mutation gate. RD-0124 added 4 zero-baseline enforcing checks: production-blockers · name-collisions · diagnostic-doc-drift · graph-integrity — plus gate-injection as its own enforcing conventions.yml job. All run ENFORCING in CI.)
devtools-standard-commands.lint-fungi: node scripts/lint-fungi.mjs [--summary|--json|--soft] [paths…]   (.fungi source-quality gate: flow comments + contract{intent} sans auto-settings + no AI slop/bad-syntax; fixtures whitelisted in governance/fungi-lint-allow.json; inline //fungi-allow: CODE; registered in lint-conventions → runs at Stop)
devtools-standard-commands.coverage-codes: node scripts/audit-coverage.mjs codes   (#218 bidirectional code-coverage cross-check)
devtools-standard-commands.doc-drift: node scripts/audit-doc-drift.mjs   (DOC-004 #219: doc test/package COUNTS vs version.json authority; registered in lint-conventions)
devtools-standard-commands.mutation: node scripts/audit-mutation.mjs   (SEC-002 #219: re-introduce each fail-closed gate's hole, assert its test kills it; git-backed safety; ~40s)
devtools-standard-commands.graph-all: node scripts/graph-all.mjs   (RD-0124: runs ALL THREE graph generators — project graph + kb graph + per-package Hardened Border --check. This is what 'run graph' should mean; wired into run-phase-close. The bare 'graph' below is PROJECT-only.)
devtools-standard-commands.graph: node packages-galerina/galerina-core-cli/dist/index.js graph --out build/graph   (PROJECT graph only — one of three; prefer graph-all)
devtools-standard-commands.kb-graph: node packages-galerina/galerina-devtools-kb-graph/dist/cli.js --out build/kb-graph   (KB cross-ref graph: orphans + broken-links → build/kb-graph; the signal audit-stray-docs reads, so refresh before it)
devtools-standard-commands.package-graph-check: node packages-galerina/galerina-devtools-package-graph/dist/cli.js --scope <package-path> --check   (Hardened Border gate for ONE package; graph-all runs it for ALL)

devtools-added-2026-06-03: galerina-devtools-naming       — FUNGI-NAMING-001..005 naming standard enforcement (abbreviations, missing intent, generic types)
galerina-devtools-context      — Context Receipt generator: 51-97% token reduction for AI code windows
galerina-devtools-intelligence — BM25 hybrid code search: indexes .fungi files, queries by semantic tokens + structural filters
galerina-devtools-provenance   — Data lineage tracker: maps source→transform→sink with trust boundary visualization
devtools-added-2026-06-05: galerina-devtools-package-graph — Per-package boundary governance: internal edges, external-dependency surface, orphan detection. Writes .graph/BOUNDARY.md inside each scanned package. `--check` = Hardened Border CI gate (fails on new external deps). Run: package-graph --scope <pkg>

galerina-ext-bridge-cpp        — First real implements InferenceBridge: BitNet ternary CPU/GPU bridges (MIT). Real hardware detection (AVX2/NEON kernel family + NVIDIA GPU via nvidia-smi). Native N-API addon is a documented seam; TPLSimulator is the deterministic fallback.

galerina-tower-citizen         — Unified Hybrid Inference Engine (Brain): TPL ternary VPP (BitNet-faithful I2_S), precision router (BitNet/NVFP4/Groq), InferenceBridge contract, governed Load/Execute/Erase lifecycle.
